name: tbucket
description: Creates groups of values - buckets - out of a @timestamp attribute. The size of the buckets can either be provided directly as a duration or period, or chosen based on a target bucket count from explicit `from`/`to` parameters.

params.name: buckets
params.description: Target number of buckets, or desired bucket size. When a number, the actual bucket size is derived from `from`/`to`. When a duration or period, it is the explicit bucket size.

params.name: buckets
params.description: Target number of buckets, or desired bucket size. When a number, the actual bucket size is derived from `from`/`to`. When a duration or period, it is the explicit bucket size.

params.description: Target number of buckets, or desired bucket size. When a number, the actual bucket size is derived from `from`/`to`. When a duration or period, it is the explicit bucket size.

params.name: from
params.description: Start of the range. Required with a numeric `buckets`.

params.name: to
params.description: End of the range. Required with a numeric `buckets`.

examples:
FROM sample_data
| STATS min = MIN(@timestamp), max = MAX(@timestamp) BY bucket = TBUCKET(1 hour)
| SORT min

| SORT min
